3239970.name: ISS Simulator
3239970.description:
Experience the realism of space!”

This is the ultimate space simulator game, precisely modeling the space and space environment inside the International Space Station (ISS) under the supervision of JAXA. Gravity, inertia, and orbital mechanics based on realistic physical laws await the player in realistic space. Experience firsthand the tension of moving in zero gravity, operating real space equipment, and executing missions.

Features:.

Realistic space design supervised by JAXA

Simulation of physical phenomena in space as close to reality as possible

Interactive environment with faithful reproduction of the ISS interior and attention to detail
developers: 株式会社スペースデータ
publishers: 株式会社スペースデータ
